google.text: CARPCO Transport Services Load Number: 382039 Date: 01/29/2026 Carrier Rate and Load Confirmation ARPCO TRANSPORT SERVICES 1702 Minters Chapel Road #212 Grapevine, TX 76051 Jesse Lewis (817) 481-7442 x 7125 (phone) jesse.lewis@arpco.com Carrier: DAVUTRANS INC Contact: Nick Peterson, (p) 5132161123 (f) Equipment Type: Reefer 53' Shipper Pickup (Stop 1) BIMBO BAKERIES - ZANESVILLE, OH 3005 East Pointe Drive Zanesville, OH US 43701 Expected Date: 01/29/2026 Appointment Required: No Appointment Time: 13:00. Pickup Instructions: MUST BE PRECOOLED TO -10°F BEFORE ARRIVING. DRIVER MUST REQUEST TO BE ON DOCK AND OBTAIN FIRST AND LAST NAME IF NOT ALLOWED. MUST BE FOOD GRADE TRAILER. CLEAN, NO CRACKS, NO ODORS, NO HOLES, NO PEST. IF THE TRAILER IS NOT FOOD GRADE THEY WILL BE REJECTED AND A TRUCK ORDERED NOT USED WILL NOT BE PAID. MUST SUBMIT PICTURE OF SEAL AFFIXED TO THE TRAILER DOOR PRIOR TO DEPARTURE SEAL MUST BE INTACT FROM THE TIME THE CARRIER LEAVES ORIGIN ALL THE WAY THROUGH DESTINATION. DO NOT REMOVE SEAL FOR ANY REASON. Shipper References: Consignee Delivery (Stop 2) BEN E. KEITH - FORT WORTH, TX 7650 Will Rogers Boulevard Fort Worth, TX US 76140 Expected Date: 01/31/2026 Appointment Required: Yes Appointment Time: 06:00 Delivery Instructions: LATE FEES CAN BE UP TO OR EXCEED $500 PER DAY AND WILL BE DEDUCTED. NO EXCEPTIONS. ALL LUMPERS ARE PREPAID. DO NOT PAY LUMPER FEE, WILL NOT BE REIMBURSED IF PAID. ***ANY ADDITIONAL CHARGES PERTAINING TO THIS LOAD NEEDS TO BE REPORTED AND APPROVED BEFORE PAYING FOR IT SO ARPCO CAN REIMBURSE*** TRUCKS ARRIVING AFTER SCHEDULED APPOINTMENTS ARE CONSIDERED WORK-IN'S. WORK-IN'S ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR DETENTION FIRST COME FIRST SERVE FACILITIES ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR DETENTION CHARGES Consignee References: Shipment Information Handling Unit Package Qty Type Qty Туре Weight 672 Cases 32500 lbs Commodity Description FROZEN FOOD Carrier Fees Description Net Freight Charges Accessorial Charges Total Cost Item Description On Time Delivery Unit Fixed Cost Fee Details Cost USD 3,400.00 USD 500.00 USD 3,900.00 Quantity 1.00 Unit Price Total USD 500.00 USD 500.00
